subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book proclaimeth: There is none other God but I, the All-Powerful over whatsoever I will, through My Name, the All-Dominant over all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب ینطق انه لا اله الا انا المقتدر علی ما اشاء باسمی المهیمن علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for service, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
